name: Explore
intent: explore a registry listing — a skill, harness, or rig — and dissect what it's actually for

steps.instruction: Take the registry listing the user names — a skill, harness, or rig — or pick one that's trending right now. Pull up everything about it: what it does, how it runs (live tool, cloud runtime, or instructions), and who made it.
Dissect its use cases: three concrete, real-world workflows this tool enables, what other registry skills pair well with it (name them), and who it's for.
Write an explorer's brief in plain English: what it is, when to reach for it, the top use cases, the best pairings, and what to try first.
